description: A media planner needs to create a flighting schedule for a campaign, concentrating ad spend during peak seasonal periods.

nodes.task_description: Analyze historical sales data to identify seasonal peaks.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies that sales peak in June-July and November.

nodes.task_description: Create a flighting calendar that allocates a higher percentage of the media budget to the identified peak months.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a calendar with increased spend during the peak seasons and lower spend during off-seasons.

nodes.task_description: Share the flighting plan with the campaign management team for implementation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent communicates the plan to the execution team.
